_note: Apply to the 'main' branch via: gh api repos/fsafaei/concerto/branches/main/protection --method PUT --input .github/branch-protection.json
_solo_maintainer_note: required_approving_review_count is 0 because the project currently has one maintainer who cannot self-approve PRs (enforce_admins is true). When a second human reviewer exists, flip ALL THREE together: required_approving_review_count -> 1, require_code_owner_reviews -> true, require_last_push_approval -> true.
